sourceDefinition.label: 3D
sourceDefinition.description: Applies a brightness or alpha gradient within each bar so it fades from full brightness at one edge to dark at the other, giving a three-dimensional appearance.

sourceDescription: Applies a brightness or alpha gradient within each bar so it fades from full brightness at one edge to dark at the other, giving a three-dimensional appearance.

sourceDefinition.label: Palette Rep
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the full palette color sequence repeats across the model. Higher values produce more, thinner bars.

sourceDescription: Number of times the full palette color sequence repeats across the model. Higher values produce more, thinner bars.

sourceDefinition.label: Cycles
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the bars scroll completely across the model during the effect. Higher values make the bars move faster.

sourceDescription: Number of times the bars scroll completely across the model during the effect. Higher values make the bars move faster.

sourceDefinition.label: Direction
sourceDefinition.description: Direction the bars travel. Expand/compress radiate from or collapse toward a center point. Alternate modes snap bars one step at a time. Custom modes place static bars with an adjustable center offset.

sourceDescription: Direction the bars travel. Expand/compress radiate from or collapse toward a center point. Alternate modes snap bars one step at a time. Custom modes place static bars with an adjustable center offset.

sourceDefinition.label: Gradient
sourceDefinition.description: Smoothly blends colors between adjacent bars instead of using hard edges, creating a continuous gradient across the palette.

sourceDescription: Smoothly blends colors between adjacent bars instead of using hard edges, creating a continuous gradient across the palette.

sourceDefinition.label: Highlight
sourceDefinition.description: Adds a bright white highlight line at the leading edge of each bar to make the boundaries between colors more visible.

sourceDescription: Adds a bright white highlight line at the leading edge of each bar to make the boundaries between colors more visible.

sourceDefinition.label: Bkgrd Chunks
sourceDefinition.description: Divides the pattern into repeated segments, increasing the frequency of the mathematical function to create more detailed or tiled patterns.

sourceDescription: Divides the pattern into repeated segments, increasing the frequency of the mathematical function to create more detailed or tiled patterns.

sourceDefinition.label: Colors
sourceDefinition.description: Selects the color source. Rainbow uses a full HSV rainbow cycle, while Palette uses the user-defined palette colors.

sourceDescription: Selects the color source. Rainbow uses a full HSV rainbow cycle, while Palette uses the user-defined palette colors.

sourceDefinition.label: Direction
sourceDefinition.description: Sets the animation direction. Reverse inverts the pattern movement so it scrolls in the opposite direction.

sourceDescription: Sets the animation direction. Reverse inverts the pattern movement so it scrolls in the opposite direction.

sourceDefinition.label: Speed
sourceDefinition.description: Controls how fast the pattern animates. For styles 1-5 this sets the scroll rate; for plasma styles 6-10 higher values produce slower, smoother animation.

sourceDescription: Controls how fast the pattern animates. For styles 1-5 this sets the scroll rate; for plasma styles 6-10 higher values produce slower, smoother animation.

sourceDefinition.label: Style
sourceDefinition.description: Selects the mathematical pattern formula. Styles 1-5 produce geometric butterfly-like patterns; styles 6-10 generate animated plasma effects.

sourceDescription: Selects the mathematical pattern formula. Styles 1-5 produce geometric butterfly-like patterns; styles 6-10 generate animated plasma effects.

sourceDefinition.label: Bounce
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, circles bounce off the edges of the model instead of wrapping around to the opposite side.

sourceDescription: When enabled, circles bounce off the edges of the model instead of wrapping around to the opposite side.

sourceDefinition.label: Number of Circles
sourceDefinition.description: Sets the number of circles drawn on the model. In radial mode, controls the number of color rings.

sourceDescription: Sets the number of circles drawn on the model. In radial mode, controls the number of color rings.

sourceDefinition.label: Radial
sourceDefinition.description: Draws expanding concentric rings radiating outward from the center point, using palette colors in alternating bands.

sourceDescription: Draws expanding concentric rings radiating outward from the center point, using palette colors in alternating bands.

sourceDefinition.label: Size
sourceDefinition.description: Controls the radius of each circle. In radial mode, this sets the thickness of the concentric rings.

sourceDescription: Controls the radius of each circle. In radial mode, this sets the thickness of the concentric rings.

sourceDefinition.label: Speed
sourceDefinition.description: Controls how fast the circles move across the model. In radial mode, controls the speed of the outward ring expansion.

sourceDescription: Controls how fast the circles move across the model. In radial mode, controls the speed of the outward ring expansion.

sourceDefinition.label: Circular Palette
sourceDefinition.description: Makes the palette wrap around by blending the last color back into the first, creating a seamless continuous color loop instead of stopping at the last color.

sourceDescription: Makes the palette wrap around by blending the last color back into the first, creating a seamless continuous color loop instead of stopping at the last color.

sourceDefinition.label: Count
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the full palette color sequence cycles during the effect. Higher values make the color transitions happen faster.

sourceDescription: Number of times the full palette color sequence cycles during the effect. Higher values make the color transitions happen faster.

sourceDefinition.label: Horizontal Fade
sourceDefinition.description: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the horizontal center to black at the left and right edges.

sourceDescription: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the horizontal center to black at the left and right edges.

sourceDefinition.label: Reverse Fades
sourceDefinition.description: Reverses the direction of the vertical and horizontal fades so brightness is at the edges and fades to black at the center.

sourceDescription: Reverses the direction of the vertical and horizontal fades so brightness is at the edges and fades to black at the center.

sourceDefinition.label: Shimmer
sourceDefinition.description: Alternates between the current wash color and black on every other frame, creating a rapid strobe-like flicker.

sourceDescription: Alternates between the current wash color and black on every other frame, creating a rapid strobe-like flicker.

sourceDefinition.label: Vertical Fade
sourceDefinition.description: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the vertical center to black at the top and bottom edges.

sourceDescription: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the vertical center to black at the top and bottom edges.

sourceDefinition.label: Growth Cycles
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the fire height oscillates (grows and shrinks) over the effect duration. Zero means no oscillation.

sourceDescription: Number of times the fire height oscillates (grows and shrinks) over the effect duration. Zero means no oscillation.

sourceDefinition.label: Height
sourceDefinition.description: Controls how tall the flames reach. Higher values produce taller flames that extend further across the buffer.

sourceDescription: Controls how tall the flames reach. Higher values produce taller flames that extend further across the buffer.

sourceDefinition.label: Hue Shift
sourceDefinition.description: Shifts the fire color palette hue. At zero the fire is red/yellow; increasing values shift toward other colors like blue or green.

sourceDescription: Shifts the fire color palette hue. At zero the fire is red/yellow; increasing values shift toward other colors like blue or green.

sourceDefinition.label: Location
sourceDefinition.description: Which edge of the buffer the fire originates from.

sourceDescription: Which edge of the buffer the fire originates from.

sourceDefinition.label: Particles in Explosion
sourceDefinition.description: Number of particles created in each explosion. More particles create denser, more dramatic bursts.

sourceDescription: Number of particles created in each explosion. More particles create denser, more dramatic bursts.

sourceDefinition.label: Number of Explosions
sourceDefinition.description: Total number of firework explosions randomly distributed across the effect duration. Disabled when using music or timing triggers.

sourceDescription: Total number of firework explosions randomly distributed across the effect duration. Disabled when using music or timing triggers.

sourceDefinition.label: Particle Fade
sourceDefinition.description: How long particles remain visible before fading out. Higher values make particles last longer.

sourceDescription: How long particles remain visible before fading out. Higher values make particles last longer.

sourceDefinition.label: Gravity
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, particles arc downward over time simulating gravity. When disabled, particles fly in straight lines.

sourceDescription: When enabled, particles arc downward over time simulating gravity. When disabled, particles fly in straight lines.

sourceDefinition.label: Velocity of Particles
sourceDefinition.description: Maximum speed of particles as they fly outward from the explosion center. Higher values create larger bursts.

sourceDescription: Maximum speed of particles as they fly outward from the explosion center. Higher values create larger bursts.

sourceDefinition.label: X Location
sourceDefinition.description: Fixed horizontal position for explosions as a percentage of buffer width. Set to -1 for random placement.

sourceDescription: Fixed horizontal position for explosions as a percentage of buffer width. Set to -1 for random placement.

sourceDefinition.label: Direction
sourceDefinition.description: Direction the lightning bolt extends. 'Up' draws from bottom to top, 'Down' draws from top to bottom.

sourceDescription: Direction the lightning bolt extends. 'Up' draws from bottom to top, 'Down' draws from top to bottom.

sourceDefinition.label: Forked Lightning
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, the bolt splits into a secondary fork partway through, creating a branching lightning appearance.

sourceDescription: When enabled, the bolt splits into a secondary fork partway through, creating a branching lightning appearance.

sourceDefinition.label: Number of Segments
sourceDefinition.description: Number of zigzag segments that make up the lightning bolt. More segments create a longer, more detailed bolt.

sourceDescription: Number of zigzag segments that make up the lightning bolt. More segments create a longer, more detailed bolt.

sourceDefinition.label: Width of Bolt
sourceDefinition.description: Controls the horizontal deviation of each zigzag segment. Higher values make the bolt spread wider side-to-side.

sourceDescription: Controls the horizontal deviation of each zigzag segment. Higher values make the bolt spread wider side-to-side.

sourceDefinition.label: Width
sourceDefinition.description: Pixel thickness of each bolt segment line. Higher values draw a wider, more visible bolt.

sourceDescription: Pixel thickness of each bolt segment line. Higher values draw a wider, more visible bolt.

sourceDefinition.label: Band Size
sourceDefinition.description: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each color band of the marquee pattern.

sourceDescription: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each color band of the marquee pattern.

sourceDefinition.label: Reverse
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, the marquee pattern moves in the opposite direction around the perimeter.

sourceDescription: When enabled, the marquee pattern moves in the opposite direction around the perimeter.

sourceDefinition.label: Skip Size
sourceDefinition.description: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each color band. Zero means bands are placed back-to-back with no gap.

sourceDescription: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each color band. Zero means bands are placed back-to-back with no gap.

sourceDefinition.label: Speed
sourceDefinition.description: How fast the marquee pattern moves around the perimeter. Zero freezes the animation.

sourceDescription: How fast the marquee pattern moves around the perimeter. Zero freezes the animation.

sourceDefinition.label: Stagger
sourceDefinition.description: Offsets the starting position of each concentric ring so inner rings appear shifted relative to outer rings, creating a spiral-like look.

sourceDescription: Offsets the starting position of each concentric ring so inner rings appear shifted relative to outer rings, creating a spiral-like look.

sourceDefinition.label: Thickness
sourceDefinition.description: Number of concentric marquee rings drawn inward from the outer edge. Each ring is offset by one pixel toward the center.

sourceDescription: Number of concentric marquee rings drawn inward from the outer edge. Each ring is offset by one pixel toward the center.

sourceDefinition.label: Cycle Count
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the start-to-end intensity ramp repeats over the effect duration. Values greater than 1 create a pulsing look.

sourceDescription: Number of times the start-to-end intensity ramp repeats over the effect duration. Values greater than 1 create a pulsing look.

sourceDefinition.label: End Intensity
sourceDefinition.description: Sets the brightness level at the end of the effect as a percentage. The intensity ramps linearly from Start to End over the effect duration.

sourceDescription: Sets the brightness level at the end of the effect as a percentage. The intensity ramps linearly from Start to End over the effect duration.

sourceDefinition.label: Shimmer
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, the effect alternates between the first and second palette colors on each frame, creating a rapid flickering shimmer.

sourceDescription: When enabled, the effect alternates between the first and second palette colors on each frame, creating a rapid flickering shimmer.

sourceDefinition.label: Start Intensity
sourceDefinition.description: Sets the brightness level at the beginning of the effect as a percentage of the palette color's full value.

sourceDescription: Sets the brightness level at the beginning of the effect as a percentage of the palette color's full value.

sourceDefinition.label: 3D
sourceDefinition.description: Applies a brightness or alpha gradient across each arm to simulate depth. 3D fades edges, 3D Inverted fades the center, and Sweep applies a directional gradient from one edge to the other.

sourceDescription: Applies a brightness or alpha gradient across each arm to simulate depth. 3D fades edges, 3D Inverted fades the center, and Sweep applies a directional gradient from one edge to the other.

sourceDefinition.label: #Arms
sourceDefinition.description: Number of colored arms radiating from the center of the pinwheel. Each arm uses the next color from the palette.

sourceDescription: Number of colored arms radiating from the center of the pinwheel. Each arm uses the next color from the palette.

sourceDefinition.label: Size
sourceDefinition.description: Length of each arm as a percentage of the maximum radius. Values above 100 extend the arms beyond the model edges.

sourceDescription: Length of each arm as a percentage of the maximum radius. Values above 100 extend the arms beyond the model edges.

sourceDefinition.label: Rotation
sourceDefinition.description: Sets the rotation direction. When checked, the pinwheel spins counter-clockwise; when unchecked, it spins clockwise.

sourceDescription: Sets the rotation direction. When checked, the pinwheel spins counter-clockwise; when unchecked, it spins clockwise.

sourceDefinition.label: Speed
sourceDefinition.description: Rotation speed of the pinwheel. Higher values make the arms spin faster.

sourceDescription: Rotation speed of the pinwheel. Higher values make the arms spin faster.

sourceDefinition.label: Style
sourceDefinition.description: Rendering algorithm to use. The new method uses ISPC-accelerated rendering for better performance and fills the entire buffer; the old method draws arms by stepping along radial lines. Existing sequences are migrated to preserve 'Old Render Method' so their look doesn't change.

sourceDescription: Rendering algorithm to use. The new method uses ISPC-accelerated rendering for better performance and fills the entire buffer; the old method draws arms by stepping along radial lines. Existing sequences are migrated to preserve 'Old Render Method' so their look doesn't change.

sourceDefinition.label: Thick
sourceDefinition.description: Width of each arm as a percentage of the angular space between arms. At 100, adjacent arms touch with no gap between them.

sourceDescription: Width of each arm as a percentage of the angular space between arms. At 100, adjacent arms touch with no gap between them.

sourceDefinition.label: Twist
sourceDefinition.description: Degrees of curvature applied along each arm from center to tip. Positive values twist clockwise, negative values twist counter-clockwise, creating spiral arms.

sourceDescription: Degrees of curvature applied along each arm from center to tip. Positive values twist clockwise, negative values twist counter-clockwise, creating spiral arms.

sourceDefinition.label: Cycle Count
sourceDefinition.description: Number of on/off shimmer cycles over the duration of the effect. Higher values produce faster flickering.

sourceDescription: Number of on/off shimmer cycles over the duration of the effect. Higher values produce faster flickering.

sourceDefinition.label: Duty Factor
sourceDefinition.description: Percentage of each cycle the color is visible before going black. Lower values produce shorter on-flashes with longer dark gaps.

sourceDescription: Percentage of each cycle the color is visible before going black. Lower values produce shorter on-flashes with longer dark gaps.

sourceDefinition.label: Use All Colors
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, each pixel is assigned a random color from the palette every frame. When disabled, all pixels use the same color which cycles sequentially through the palette.

sourceDescription: When enabled, each pixel is assigned a random color from the palette every frame. When disabled, all pixels use the same color which cycles sequentially through the palette.

sourceDefinition.label: Acceleration
sourceDefinition.description: Adjusts the expansion speed curve. Positive values make the ring expand slowly then accelerate; negative values make it start fast then decelerate.

sourceDescription: Adjusts the expansion speed curve. Positive values make the ring expand slowly then accelerate; negative values make it start fast then decelerate.

sourceDefinition.label: Blend Edges
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, the ring edges fade out smoothly based on distance from the ring center, creating a soft glow instead of hard edges.

sourceDescription: When enabled, the ring edges fade out smoothly based on distance from the ring center, creating a soft glow instead of hard edges.

sourceDefinition.label: Center X
sourceDefinition.description: Horizontal center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer width.

sourceDescription: Horizontal center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer width.

sourceDefinition.label: Center Y
sourceDefinition.description: Vertical center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer height.

sourceDescription: Vertical center of the shockwave ring as a percentage of the buffer height.

sourceDefinition.label: Cycles
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the shockwave ring expands from Radius1 to Radius2 over the effect duration.

sourceDescription: Number of times the shockwave ring expands from Radius1 to Radius2 over the effect duration.

sourceDefinition.label: Radius2
sourceDefinition.description: Ending radius of the expanding ring at the end of each cycle.

sourceDescription: Ending radius of the expanding ring at the end of each cycle.

sourceDefinition.label: Width2
sourceDefinition.description: Thickness of the ring band at the end of each cycle.

sourceDescription: Thickness of the ring band at the end of each cycle.

sourceDefinition.label: Scale to Buffer
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, radius and width values are treated as percentages of the buffer size. When disabled, values are in absolute pixels.

sourceDescription: When enabled, radius and width values are treated as percentages of the buffer size. When disabled, values are in absolute pixels.

sourceDefinition.label: Radius1
sourceDefinition.description: Starting radius of the expanding ring at the beginning of each cycle.

sourceDescription: Starting radius of the expanding ring at the beginning of each cycle.

sourceDefinition.label: Width1
sourceDefinition.description: Thickness of the ring band at the start of each cycle.

sourceDescription: Thickness of the ring band at the start of each cycle.

sourceDefinition.label: Number of Advances
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the skip pattern shifts position over the effect duration. Higher values make the pattern appear to march along the strand.

sourceDescription: Number of times the skip pattern shifts position over the effect duration. Higher values make the pattern appear to march along the strand.

sourceDefinition.label: Band size
sourceDefinition.description: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each colored band of the skip pattern.

sourceDescription: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each colored band of the skip pattern.

sourceDefinition.label: Chase Size
sourceDefinition.description: Length of each lit chase segment as a percentage of the total strand length.

sourceDescription: Length of each lit chase segment as a percentage of the total strand length.

sourceDefinition.label: Chase Types
sourceDefinition.description: Direction and movement pattern of the chase. Bounce types reverse at edges, Dual runs two chases simultaneously, Static types display without motion, and Middle types expand or contract from the center.

sourceDescription: Direction and movement pattern of the chase. Bounce types reverse at edges, Dual runs two chases simultaneously, Static types display without motion, and Middle types expand or contract from the center.

sourceDefinition.label: Cycles
sourceDefinition.description: Number of complete chase traversals over the effect duration. Higher values make the chase move faster.

sourceDescription: Number of complete chase traversals over the effect duration. Higher values make the chase move faster.

sourceDefinition.label: Fade
sourceDefinition.description: Applies a brightness fade to the chase segment. 'From Head' fades from the leading edge, 'From Tail' from the trailing edge, 'Head and Tail' fades both ends, and 'Middle' fades from the center outward.

sourceDescription: Applies a brightness fade to the chase segment. 'From Head' fades from the leading edge, 'From Tail' from the trailing edge, 'Head and Tail' fades both ends, and 'Middle' fades from the center outward.

sourceDefinition.label: Intensity
sourceDefinition.description: Controls the intensity parameter of the selected FX animation. Its exact meaning varies by effect (e.g., brightness, size, or density).

sourceDescription: Controls the intensity parameter of the selected FX animation. Its exact meaning varies by effect (e.g., brightness, size, or density).

sourceDefinition.label: Colors
sourceDefinition.description: Selects the color source for the chase. Palette uses the user-defined palette colors; Rainbow cycles through all hues automatically.

sourceDescription: Selects the color source for the chase. Palette uses the user-defined palette colors; Rainbow cycles through all hues automatically.

sourceDefinition.label: Number Chases
sourceDefinition.description: Number of simultaneous chase segments running across the strand.

sourceDescription: Number of simultaneous chase segments running across the strand.

sourceDefinition.label: Skip size
sourceDefinition.description: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each colored band. Set to 0 for no gaps.

sourceDescription: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each colored band. Set to 0 for no gaps.

sourceDefinition.label: Max flakes
sourceDefinition.description: Maximum number of snowflakes visible on the buffer at the same time.

sourceDescription: Maximum number of snowflakes visible on the buffer at the same time.

sourceDefinition.label: Falling
sourceDefinition.description: Selects the snowflake movement mode. 'Driving' scrolls flakes diagonally across the buffer. 'Falling' drops flakes from top to bottom. 'Falling & Accumulating' drops flakes that pile up at the bottom.

sourceDescription: Selects the snowflake movement mode. 'Driving' scrolls flakes diagonally across the buffer. 'Falling' drops flakes from top to bottom. 'Falling & Accumulating' drops flakes that pile up at the bottom.

sourceDefinition.label: Speed
sourceDefinition.description: Controls how fast snowflakes move. In Driving mode this affects horizontal and vertical scroll speed; in Falling modes it controls the rate of downward movement.

sourceDescription: Controls how fast snowflakes move. In Driving mode this affects horizontal and vertical scroll speed; in Falling modes it controls the rate of downward movement.

sourceDefinition.label: Type
sourceDefinition.description: Selects the snowflake shape. 0 uses a random mix of all types each frame. Types 1-9 are specific shapes ranging from single pixels to multi-node crosses, diamonds, and squares.

sourceDescription: Selects the snowflake shape. 0 uses a random mix of all types each frame. Types 1-9 are specific shapes ranging from single pixels to multi-node crosses, diamonds, and squares.

sourceDefinition.label: 3D
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, applies a brightness gradient across each spiral arm to simulate a 3D shading effect, making the arms appear rounded.

sourceDescription: When enabled, applies a brightness gradient across each spiral arm to simulate a 3D shading effect, making the arms appear rounded.

sourceDefinition.label: Blend
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, blends all palette colors vertically across each spiral arm instead of using distinct per-arm colors.

sourceDescription: When enabled, blends all palette colors vertically across each spiral arm instead of using distinct per-arm colors.

sourceDefinition.label: Palette Rep
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times the full color palette is repeated across the spirals. Higher values create more spiral arms by duplicating the palette pattern.

sourceDescription: Number of times the full color palette is repeated across the spirals. Higher values create more spiral arms by duplicating the palette pattern.

sourceDefinition.label: Grow
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually increase in thickness over the effect duration.

sourceDescription: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually increase in thickness over the effect duration.

sourceDefinition.label: Movement
sourceDefinition.description: Speed and direction of the spiral rotation. Positive values rotate in one direction, negative in the other. Zero keeps the spirals stationary.

sourceDescription: Speed and direction of the spiral rotation. Positive values rotate in one direction, negative in the other. Zero keeps the spirals stationary.

sourceDefinition.label: Spiral Wraps
sourceDefinition.description: Number of times each spiral arm wraps around the model from bottom to top. Negative values reverse the wrap direction. Larger absolute values produce tighter spirals.

sourceDescription: Number of times each spiral arm wraps around the model from bottom to top. Negative values reverse the wrap direction. Larger absolute values produce tighter spirals.

sourceDefinition.label: Shrink
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually decrease in thickness over the effect duration. When both Grow and Shrink are enabled, the arms grow then shrink.

sourceDescription: When enabled, the spiral arms gradually decrease in thickness over the effect duration. When both Grow and Shrink are enabled, the arms grow then shrink.

sourceDefinition.label: Thickness
sourceDefinition.description: Width of each spiral arm as a percentage of the available space. At 100% the arms fill the entire model with no gaps between them.

sourceDescription: Width of each spiral arm as a percentage of the available space. At 100% the arms fill the entire model with no gaps between them.

sourceDefinition.label: Strobe Duration
sourceDefinition.description: How many frames each strobe flash remains visible before fading out. Higher values make flashes linger longer.

sourceDescription: How many frames each strobe flash remains visible before fading out. Higher values make flashes linger longer.

sourceDefinition.label: Number Strobes
sourceDefinition.description: How many strobe flashes are active at the same time. Higher values create a denser strobe field.

sourceDescription: How many strobe flashes are active at the same time. Higher values create a denser strobe field.

sourceDefinition.label: Strobe Type
sourceDefinition.description: Shape of each strobe flash. Type 1 is a single pixel, type 2 adds a random cross arm, type 3 is a full plus shape, and type 4 alternates between plus and X shapes.

sourceDescription: Shape of each strobe flash. Type 1 is a single pixel, type 2 adds a random cross arm, type 3 is a full plus shape, and type 4 alternates between plus and X shapes.

sourceDefinition.label: Percent of Lights
sourceDefinition.description: Percentage of pixels that are actively twinkling at any given time. Higher values create a denser twinkling field.

sourceDescription: Percentage of pixels that are actively twinkling at any given time. Higher values create a denser twinkling field.

sourceDefinition.label: Re-Randomize after twinkle
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, each pixel is assigned a new random position after its twinkle cycle completes. When disabled, pixels twinkle in the same locations repeatedly.

sourceDescription: When enabled, each pixel is assigned a new random position after its twinkle cycle completes. When disabled, pixels twinkle in the same locations repeatedly.

sourceDefinition.label: Twinkle Steps
sourceDefinition.description: Number of frames for a complete twinkle cycle (fade up then fade down). Lower values create faster, snappier twinkles; higher values create slow, gentle fades.

sourceDescription: Number of frames for a complete twinkle cycle (fade up then fade down). Lower values create faster, snappier twinkles; higher values create slow, gentle fades.

sourceDefinition.label: Strobe
sourceDefinition.description: When enabled, twinkling pixels snap on and off instantly instead of fading, creating a strobe-like flash effect.

sourceDescription: When enabled, twinkling pixels snap on and off instantly instead of fading, creating a strobe-like flash effect.

sourceDefinition.label: Style
sourceDefinition.description: Selects the rendering algorithm. Old Render Method uses the original per-frame logic; New Render Method uses an updated approach with smoother transitions.

sourceDescription: Selects the rendering algorithm. Old Render Method uses the original per-frame logic; New Render Method uses an updated approach with smoother transitions.

sourceDefinition.label: Wave Direction
sourceDefinition.description: The horizontal direction the wave scrolls. Right to Left moves the pattern leftward, Left to Right moves it rightward.

sourceDescription: The horizontal direction the wave scrolls. Right to Left moves the pattern leftward, Left to Right moves it rightward.

sourceDefinition.label: Fill Colors
sourceDefinition.description: How the area below the wave is filled. None leaves it empty, Rainbow fills with a hue gradient, and Palette fills using the effect color palette.

sourceDescription: How the area below the wave is filled. None leaves it empty, Rainbow fills with a hue gradient, and Palette fills using the effect color palette.

sourceDefinition.label: Number of Waves
sourceDefinition.description: Number of wave cycles drawn across the buffer width. 1.0 is one full wave; fractional values draw partial waves. Higher values fit more wave cycles onto the model.

sourceDescription: Number of wave cycles drawn across the buffer width. 1.0 is one full wave; fractional values draw partial waves. Higher values fit more wave cycles onto the model.

sourceDefinition.label: Wave Type
sourceDefinition.description: The waveform shape drawn across the model. Sine produces smooth curves, Triangle creates sharp zigzags, Square makes flat-topped waves, Decaying Sine fades over time, and Fractal/ivy generates random branching patterns.

sourceDescription: The waveform shape drawn across the model. Sine produces smooth curves, Triangle creates sharp zigzags, Square makes flat-topped waves, Decaying Sine fades over time, and Fractal/ivy generates random branching patterns.

sourceDefinition.label: Scale Height of Wave
sourceDefinition.description: Scales the vertical amplitude of the wave as a percentage. Lower values flatten the wave; higher values make it reach closer to the buffer edges.

sourceDescription: Scales the vertical amplitude of the wave as a percentage. Lower values flatten the wave; higher values make it reach closer to the buffer edges.

sourceDefinition.label: Speed
sourceDefinition.description: How fast the wave scrolls horizontally across the model. Higher values create faster-moving waves.

sourceDescription: How fast the wave scrolls horizontally across the model. Higher values create faster-moving waves.
